home.title: Kundenportal demo
home.description: Walk through the full public wizard, customer status area and staff backoffice with seeded demo data.

aboutPage.title: About this demo
aboutPage.description: This project assembles the public portal, customer status area, OCR demo and staff backoffice into one persistent end-to-end demo.
aboutPage.assemblyDescription: The app favors full reachability and persistent workflows over polished UI. Every major feature has a working route, trigger and saved result.

settingsPage.title: Settings and persistence
settingsPage.description: Use this page to inspect what is persisted in the backend and what is stored locally in the browser.

ocrDemo.title: OCR demo
ocrDemo.description: Submit sample document text and store a simulated OCR extraction that survives page reloads.
ocrDemo.error: OCR demo failed. Please try again.

hausanschluss.title: House connection
hausanschluss.description: Please provide the key application data for the requested utility connection.

antragsdetails.title: Application details
antragsdetails.description: Choose the requested media, request type and your preferred date.
antragsdetails.info: Required fields block the next step. Soft-required fields trigger a warning modal and can be completed later.

anschlussort.title: Connection location
anschlussort.description: Capture the service location, object type and supporting files.
anschlussort.info: If the street address is not known yet, switch to cadastral details instead.

kontaktdaten.title: Contact data
kontaktdaten.description: Enter applicant details and clarify the technical contact setup.
kontaktdaten.info: Email confirmation is required because later notifications are sent to this address.

technischeDaten.title: Technical data
technischeDaten.description: Describe installer availability, requested power and major devices.
technischeDaten.info: This MVP focuses on the electricity-related subset of the full legacy flow.

rechtlicheHinweise.title: Legal notices
rechtlicheHinweise.description: Review the consent statements required for submission.
rechtlicheHinweise.info: All consent checkboxes below are blocking requirements.

uebersicht.title: Review and submit
uebersicht.description: Check all captured data, inspect missing soft requirements and submit the application.

final.title: Submission complete
final.description: Your tracking credentials are ready. You can log back in at any time and continue with missing information.

changeKind.label: Change type
changeKind.help: This field becomes visible when you choose “Change connection”.

message.label: Message
message.helpWithHint: Optional, maximum 255 characters. Tenant overrides may change the hint or behavior.

addressUnknown.label: Street or house number is not known yet
addressUnknown.help: Switches the form to district and plot based addressing.

usageType.label: Usage type
usageType.help: Optional detail used for internal triage.

lageplanUploads.label: Site plan uploads
lageplanUploads.help: Upload a site plan, floor plan or similar supporting document. Demo mode stores only file metadata.

applicantIsTechnicalContact.label: Applicant is also the technical contact
applicantIsTechnicalContact.help: If unchecked, a technical contact name becomes soft-required.

technicalContactName.label: Technical contact name
technicalContactName.help: Provide the name of the planner, installer or site contact.

connectionPowerKw.label: Requested connection power (kW)
connectionPowerKw.help: Enter the planned total power requirement.

technicalNotes.label: Technical notes
technicalNotes.help: Use this field for special equipment or clarifications.

privacyPolicyAccepted.label: I have read the privacy policy.
privacyPolicyAccepted.help: The privacy policy explains how application data is stored and processed.

dataProcessingAccepted.label: I agree to the processing of my application data.
dataProcessingAccepted.help: Required for application handling and follow-up communication.

emailCommunicationAccepted.label: I agree to receive email communication about this application.
emailCommunicationAccepted.help: Email is used for status updates and appointment coordination.

softRequired.title: Missing soft-required information
softRequired.description: You can skip these fields now, but processing stays blocked until they are completed.
softRequired.leaveWarning: This soft-required field can be completed later.

finalPage.passwordUnavailable: Only available from the original submit response on this device

customerLogin.title: Customer login
customerLogin.description: Use the issued tracking code and password to reopen an application.
customerLogin.error: Login failed. Please check the credentials.

customerStatus.title: Application status
customerStatus.description: Review the current status, timeline and any missing information.

invitationAccept.title: Accept staff invitation
invitationAccept.description: Set your display name and password to activate your backoffice account.

backoffice.title: Applications backoffice
backoffice.loginDescription: Demo access uses a seeded account and the local Next.js demo API.
backoffice.loginError: Login failed. Please check the credentials.
backoffice.applicationsDescription: Filter by status or unread state and open the detail view for processing.
backoffice.invitationsDescription: Invite additional staff, installers or admins into the tenant workspace.
backoffice.themeDescription: Update tenant palette values and typography for the public portal.
backoffice.themePreviewCopy: This preview reflects the current tenant palette in the public portal shell.
backoffice.formsDescription: Edit the tenant override operations used to build the effective form schema.
backoffice.overrideError: Invalid JSON. Please provide a valid override array.

validation.requiredAttachment: {field} is required before processing can continue.
validation.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
validation.invalidNumber: Please enter a valid positive number.

message.maxLength: The message must not exceed 255 characters.

confirmEmail.mismatch: The email confirmation does not match.
